title: Flowise Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the Flowise Helm chart with standalone SQLite mode or scalable queue mode using Redis and PostgreSQL.

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full release name used in resource names

commonLabels.description: Labels added to every resource created by this chart

tag.description: Flowise image tag. Defaults to appVersion validated on GitHub Releases and Docker Hub.

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private registries

replicaCount.description: Number of main Flowise server replicas

appUrl.description: Public application URL. Auto-detected from the first ingress host when empty.

logLevel.description: Log level: error | warn | info | verbose | debug

numberOfProxies.description: Rate-limit proxy count when running behind ingress or load balancers

fileSizeLimit.description: Maximum upload size accepted by Flowise

showCommunityNodes.description: Show community nodes in the UI

extraEnv.description: Extra environment variables for the main Flowise container

database.description: Database selection and external database settings

mode.description: Database mode: auto | sqlite | external | postgresql

queue.description: Queue mode settings including worker replicas and concurrency

redis.description: Redis subchart or external Redis configuration

persistence.description: Persistent storage settings for local Flowise data

service.description: Service configuration for the Flowise web application

startupProbe.description: Startup probe for the main Flowise server

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe for the main Flowise server

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe for the main Flowise server

resources.description: CPU and memory requests/limits for the main Flowise container

podLabels.description: Labels added to the main Flowise pod

podAnnotations.description: Annotations added to the main Flowise pod

extraVolumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for the main Flowise container

extraVolumes.description: Additional volumes for the Flowise pods

extraManifests.description: Extra Kubernetes manifests to deploy alongside the chart
